tasks.label: Build mobile_ionic
tasks.command: cd apps/mobile_ionic && npm run build -- --configuration production

tasks.label: PlanB: build + prepare + serve
tasks.command: cd apps/mobile_ionic && npm run build -- --configuration production && cd ../planb_webapp && node scripts/prepare-planb.mjs && npm run check && npx serve ./dist -l 8080

tasks.label: List iOS Simulators
tasks.command: xcrun simctl list devices available | grep iPhone | head -10
